emails.subject: Congratulations!
emails.body: Congratulations! Sally, Congratulations on your promotion. .it is well deserved! You have been= =20 such a big influence in my career, and I sincerely appreciate all that you do. Thanks again, Carrie Forwarded by Carrie Slagle/HOU/ECT on 01/16/2001 10:= 56=20 AM =20 =09Enron North America Corp. =09 =09From: Office of the Chairman ENRON 01/12/20= 01=20 07:31 PM =09 Sent by: Office of the Chairman@ENRON

emails.subject: Re: Congratulations!
emails.body: Re: Congratulations! Thanks for your nice note. I certainly follow your career with interest. I have been meaning to call to tell you how much we enjoyed getting the wedding picture with your Christmas card. What a great picture you look beautiful and happy. Meagan and Amanda particularly enjoyed seeing it. My best laid plans for Christmas cards became a limited vision this year only managed to get them in the mail to people outside of Houston. Maybe next year... I am in your old stomping grounds this week London. I will see Mo tomorrow night for dinner and to catch up on her life. See you next week! --Sally
